name: katana-keeper
description: Windows UI performance cultivator for MSI Katana laptop — brain layer scoring, advisory, optimization, and maintenance orchestration via PowerShell.

must_reach: Dev-Mentor / Terminal Depths MCP and game APIs
NuSyQ-Hub orchestration, healing, Nogic, and GitNexus entrypoints
SimulatedVerse agent patch-bay and ChatDev surfaces
Culture Ship / council / guardian oversight surfaces where exposed upstream
SkyClaw and related claw-family tooling where exposed upstream
delegation and sub-agent pathways across the ecosystem
federation_scope.intent: Gordon should operate as a cockpit-level orchestrator across repos rather than as an isolated single-repo agent.

startup_sequence: Read GORDON.md for the low-token operating model and current caveats.
Call keeper_snapshot first for current state and recent session context.
Use targeted MCP tools such as keeper_score, keeper_advisor, keeper_games, or keeper_think before broader calls.
Use keeper_analyze only when deterministic score/advisor/doctor output is insufficient.
After Keeper preflight, discover and attach the upstream repo-local MCP, API, and agent surfaces needed for the current mission.

avoid: running broad export/analyze flows before snapshot/score/advisor
prefer: MCP tool calls for narrow questions

commands.snapshot: keeper-bridge snapshot — full structured runtime state
commands.doctor: keeper-bridge doctor — structured diagnostics and audio triage
commands.mode: keeper-bridge mode — apply or restore a profile

current_caveats: Continuity workspace MCP currently reports degraded fallback mode in repo-local context.
keeper.ps1 and keeper-bridge.ps1 must run on Windows.
This shell previously needed an explicit pwsh shim; the workspace MCP config now uses an absolute PowerShell 7 path.
LM Studio is confirmed on Windows localhost (127.0.0.1:1234), but WSL bridge ingress has been inconsistent in this environment.
operational_rules: Prefer deterministic actions before Ollama-assisted analysis.
Do not burn tokens re-deriving state that keeper_snapshot already returns.
Treat Gordon as federated across repos, tools, agents, and local model backends whenever those surfaces are available.

upstream_systems.name: Dev-Mentor / Terminal Depths
upstream_systems.role: interactive MCP, game/API surface, quest and chronicle bridge

upstream_systems.name: SimulatedVerse
upstream_systems.role: simulation layer, patch-bay agents, ChatDev UI/runtime

upstream_systems.name: NuSyQ-Hub
upstream_systems.role: diagnostics, healing, orchestration, cross-repo coordination, Nogic visualization, GitNexus matrix

upstream_systems.name: Serena / Culture Ship / SkyClaw / claw-family tools
upstream_systems.role: specialized upstream agents and governance or retrieval surfaces when mounted
